marketing.heroTagline: Track, analyze, and land your next role
marketing.heroTitle: Stand out in your next job opportunity
marketing.heroDescription: Manage your applications in a centralized pipeline. Upload target job descriptions, let AI analyze your resume's fit, and get tailored insights to maximize your chances.
marketing.featuresDescription: A centralized hub to pipeline your jobs and powerful AI scoring.
marketing.feature1Description: Compare your CV against job descriptions with AI-powered fit scoring and clear recommendations.
marketing.feature2Description: Practise with AI-generated flashcards and interview questions tailored to your role and industry.
marketing.feature3Description: Rehearse meetings, presentations, and real workplace moments with Business English support.
marketing.feature4Description: Get personalised career guidance, application support, and practical next steps.
marketing.feature5Description: Identify missing skills and receive actionable recommendations to strengthen your profile.
marketing.feature6Description: Improve professional vocabulary, emails, meetings, and workplace communication.
marketing.faqSubtitle: Answers to common questions about StandOut.
marketing.faq1a: StandOut is a smart career hub that helps you track all your applications and analyzes your resume against target job descriptions accurately using advanced AI.
marketing.faq2q: How does the AI analysis work?
marketing.faq2a: You simply add the job description and your CV outline to an application card. The AI evaluates your skills, identifies gaps, and gives you a matching score to help you tailor your resume before applying.
marketing.faq3a: We are expanding! Soon you will be able to practice realistic English interview flashcards, simulate workplace audio scenarios, and interact with an intelligent career Coach.
marketing.faq4a: Tracking applications through the Kanban pipeline is free. Premium AI match analyses use platform credits that you can refill at any time.
marketing.testimonialsSubtitle: Professionals who prepared with StandOut and gained more confidence.
marketing.testimonial1Quote: StandOut helped me prepare for English interviews with much more confidence. The CV analysis was incredibly useful.
marketing.testimonial2Quote: The simulated scenarios made me far more prepared for meetings and presentations in English.
marketing.testimonial3Quote: The AI coach gave me personalised tips that made a real difference in my application.
marketing.pricingSubtitle: Choose monthly or annual billing and unlock advanced features as you grow.
marketing.pricingEmpty: No active plans are available at the moment.

dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Prepare for your career with AI-powered coaching and practice.
dashboard.step1Desc: Add your CV and job description to get personalised analysis.
dashboard.step2Desc: Study flashcards with questions tailored to your role and industry.
dashboard.step3Desc: Practise workplace situations and get Business English feedback.
dashboard.profileDesc: Upload your CV, add a job description, and get AI-powered analysis of your fit for the role.
dashboard.interviewDesc: Practise with AI-generated interview questions based on your career profile and target role.
dashboard.scenariosDesc: Simulate real workplace situations like meetings, presentations, and client calls.
dashboard.aiCoachDesc: Get personalised career advice, Business English coaching, and application support.
dashboard.interviewTipsDesc: Use the STAR method, research the company, and practise common questions.
dashboard.businessEnglishDesc: Professional vocabulary, email writing, and meeting etiquette.
dashboard.careerTipsDesc: Tailor your CV for each role, highlight achievements, and quantify results.
dashboard.emptyStateDesc: Upload your CV to get started with personalised career preparation.
dashboard.heroDescription: Manage your job pipeline in one place. Add applications, get AI-driven fit scores from your CV, and track your progress to your next role.
dashboard.boardDescription: Track every job application, upload real job descriptions, and let AI analyse your CV's fit quality to improve your chances.
dashboard.recruiterHeroDescription: Publish roles, receive AI-scored applications, and manage your recruitment pipeline in one place.
dashboard.recruiterPostingsDescription: Create and publish detailed roles. Receive candidate applications with automatic AI scoring.
dashboard.recruiterCompanyCardDescription: Keep your company profile current to attract stronger candidates.

roleSelect.title: Choose your profile
roleSelect.description: This is the first decision for your account. Once selected, the account stays dedicated to a single profile to avoid inconsistencies across the platform.
roleSelect.candidateDescription: I want to search for jobs, prepare my CV, practise interviews, and track applications.
roleSelect.recruiterDescription: I want to represent a company, publish jobs, and manage candidates in a recruitment pipeline.
roleSelect.notice: A user can only have one active profile. Recruiter accounts cannot operate as candidates, and candidate accounts cannot operate as recruiters.

analysis.emptyDescription: The analysis is processed in the background after the application is submitted.

scoreSummaries.high: Excellent fit for the role. This candidate aligns well with the requirements.
scoreSummaries.medium: Reasonable fit. It is worth exploring further in the interview.
scoreSummaries.low: Lower fit. Review the identified gaps before moving forward.

toasts.lowQuestionCountDescription: This stage has {current} question(s), but it was configured for {target}. You can regenerate to reach the target, or publish with the current questions.
toasts.publishSuccessDescription: The new interview column now appears in the kanban.

editableQuestion.deleteDialogDescription: This action removes the question from this interview stage.
